visual_description: In a modern office with glass partitions, five men are gathered around a large, dark conference table. Four men are seated, with two wearing white shirts and black ties, and two in light blue shirts. A man in a white shirt and black tie stands at the head of the table, while the seated men look towards him, with one gesturing with his hand.
audio_description: A single, sharp clap is heard, followed by silence.
